# Calmet

**Summary**: A meteorological modeling system used to generate 3D wind fields for dispersion models.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025]] used CALMET to process meteorological data for the CALPUFF model input.
